Dashboard.partyDesc: Discover bars, clubs and unforgettable parties.
Dashboard.prePartyDesc: Find friends for your ideal pre-party.
Dashboard.paywallDesc: Sign in now to unlock the full experience and connect with other people!
Dashboard.actionSheetDesc: Create a free account to unlock groups, messages, maps and much more.

Games.title: Games
Games.subtitle: Play with your group and set the highscore!
Games.game1Desc: The ultimate classic to break the ice and trigger laughs with your group.
Games.game2Desc: Spice up the pre-party with wild challenges and revelations.
Games.game3Desc: Find out what your friends really think about each other.
Games.game4Desc: A fast-paced card game where strategy matters, and losers drink up.

NeverHaveIEver.title: Never Have I Ever
questions: ghosted someone after a first date.
sent a risky text to the wrong person.
stolen a drink at a party.
used a fake name at a bar.
kissed someone in this room.
lied about my age to get into a club.
fallen asleep in a public place after partying.
crashed a VIP section.
drunk-texted an ex at 3am.
pretended to be sick to avoid a date.
made out with a stranger on a dance floor.
woken up with no idea where I was.
spent my rent money on a night out.
been kicked out of a bar or club.
gone skinny dipping.
lied to a partner about where I was.
done a walk of shame.
danced on a table or bar.
lost my phone on a night out.
thrown up in a taxi.
creeped on a date's ex on social media and accidentally liked an old photo.
pretended to know a stranger to get out of an uncomfortable conversation.
pretended to be the DJ to impress someone.
been caught sneaking out of someone's house.
hidden in a bathroom to avoid someone at a party.
lied during a drinking game like Never Have I Ever.
unbuttoned my pants at the dinner table because I ate too much.
flirted with a bartender to get free drinks.
cried in the bathroom of a club for absolutely no reason.
made out with someone whose name I didn't know.
taken a selfie on a stranger's phone during a night out.
lost a shoe while partying and didn't realize until later.
left a party without saying goodbye to anyone (the Irish goodbye).
fallen off a dance floor or stage.
lied about my job or college major to sound cooler at a bar.
ordered food at 4am, fallen asleep before it arrived, and found it on the porch next morning.
accidently broken something at a house party and hidden it.
swiped on Tinder just to find a group to pre-game with tonight.
pretended it was my birthday at a restaurant just to get a free dessert.
borrowed clothes from a friend and never returned them.
snuck snacks or drinks into a movie theater or festival inside my socks or jacket.
texted someone 'I'm on my way' when I hadn't even gotten out of bed.
bought a completely useless item online while drunk.
stalked someone on Instagram using a friend's fake account.
Google-searched myself to see what pops up.
walked into a glass door in public.
said 'you too' after a waiter told me to enjoy my food.
tried to open someone else's car thinking it was mine.
forgotten where I parked my car or bike after a festival.
been caught talking to myself in the mirror.

MostLikelyTo.title: Most Likely To
questions: get arrested for something stupid?
become a millionaire?
survive a zombie apocalypse?
ghost everyone and move to another country?
end up on a reality TV show?
accidentally start a fire while cooking?
get back with their toxic ex?
spend all their money on a night out?
marry someone they met on a night out?
be the last one standing at a party?
fall asleep on the bus home?
go viral on social media for something embarrassing?
date someone 10 years older?
quit their job to travel the world?
become famous?
cry at a wedding they barely know anyone at?
win a drinking competition?
start a cult by accident?
text their boss something they shouldn't?
be on a true crime podcast as a suspect?
lose their keys, phone, and wallet all in the same night?
get kicked out of a club for arguing with the bouncer?
steal the AUX cord in a taxi and play terrible music?
order 50 chicken nuggets at 4am and eat them all alone?
become best friends with the bathroom attendant or a stranger in the smoking area?
forget their friend's birthday even with Facebook notifications?
spend an hour trying to take the perfect Instagram photo of their drink?
get lost walking back from the bar to the table?
try to climb over a fence to get into a venue and get caught?
confess their love to a crush while drunk and regret it at 9am?
fall asleep in the middle of a pre-game on the couch?
show up to an event in the completely wrong dress code?
successfully fake an accent for an entire night to strangers?
get a matching tattoo with a stranger on vacation?
be the mom/dad of the group and carry water and ibuprofen everywhere?
accidentally leak a secret chat or screenshot to the group chat it was about?
spend their entire paycheck on festival tickets and skip groceries?
have a secret second Instagram account for stalking?
get banned from Uber for talking too much or being too dramatic?
agree to go to an after-party at 5am when everyone else wants to sleep?
block someone on WhatsApp and forget why they did it?
laugh at the worst possible, most inappropriate moment?
get a sunburn while inside an open-air club or beer garden?
spend 30 minutes looking for the phone that is currently in their hand?
win an argument against a brick wall because they are so stubborn?
marry for money instead of love?
become a professional meme creator?
buy drinks for the entire bar when they get a small bonus?
accidentally invite their ex to a party where their current crush is?
stay in bed for a full 48 hours binge-watching a show after one wild night out?

prompts.text: What is your biggest regret from a past relationship?
Who in this room do you think is the most attractive?
What's the most embarrassing thing you've ever done drunk?
Have you ever lied to get out of a date?
What's the most embarrassing thing on your phone right now?
Have you ever faked being sick to avoid someone?
What's the worst thing you've ever done at a party?
Have you ever had a crush on someone in this room?
What's a secret you've never told anyone here?
Have you ever stolen something?
What is the weirdest first impression you've ever had of someone in this room?
What is the longest you've gone without showering after a long festival or weekend of partying?
Have you ever snooped through a friend's bathroom cabinets or room when they left you alone?
What's the most childish thing you still do regularly?
If you had to ghost everyone in this room except for one person, who would you keep?
What is the absolute worst pickup line you've ever actually used or had used on you?
Have you ever pretended to look at your phone in public just to avoid talking to someone?
Who is the last person you stalked on Instagram or TikTok?
What is the most expensive thing you've accidentally broken while drunk?
Have you ever been caught picking your nose in public?
What's an unpopular opinion you hold that would make everyone in this room argue with you?
What is the most ridiculous lie you've ever told on a dating app profile?
Have you ever stayed in a relationship or gone on a date just for free food or drinks?
What song is your ultimate guilty pleasure that you sing alone in the shower?
What is the dumbest reason you've ever broken up with someone or gotten mad at them?
Let the group look through your phone's photo gallery for 1 minute.
Send a risky text to the 5th person in your contacts.
Do your best imitation of someone in this room.
Take a shot or finish your drink right now.
Call someone and sing them happy birthday — regardless of whether it's their birthday.
Let the group post anything on your Instagram story.
Do 20 push-ups right now.
Give a 60-second compliment to each person in the room.
Let someone in the group send a DM to your last Tinder match.
Wear something embarrassing for the next 3 rounds.
Hand over your phone to the person on your right and let them read your last 3 WhatsApp chats out loud.
Speak with a dramatic British or Spanish accent for the next 3 rounds of the game.
Give your phone to the person on your left and let them change your Instagram bio to anything they want for the next 24 hours.
Let the group choose a random contact on your phone and send them a text saying 'I know what you did last summer'.
Try to lick your elbow while dancing to whatever music is playing right now.
Let someone draw a funny mustache on your face with a washable marker or pen.
Open Spotify or Apple Music and show the group your 'On Repeat' or most recently played songs without hiding anything.
Put your hands on your knees and twerk or do a dramatic dance for 30 seconds.
Let the group mix 3 random liquids from the kitchen or bar together and take a sip of it.
Call a local pizza place or bar and try to order a completely fake item like a 'McFlurry' with a deadpan voice.
Trade a piece of clothing with the person sitting directly opposite you for the next 2 rounds.
Allow the group to blindfold you and guess 3 things from the room by smelling or touching them.
Empty out your pockets or the contents of your bag right now and explain every single item to the group.
Let someone on your left scroll through your liked posts on TikTok or Instagram for 30 seconds.
Do a dramatic, slow-motion walk across the room pretending you are on a high-fashion runway.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.socialJoin: Join With Your Favourite Social Media Account
Login.termsPrefix: By signing in with an account, you agree to gloo's
Login.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Login.emailNotVerifiedError: Please verify your email address before logging in. Check your inbox for the activation link.

Register.title: Sign up
Register.ageMinError: You must be at least 18 years old to register.
Register.passwordWeakError: Password must be at least 8 characters long, contain an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character.
Register.emailExistsError: This email address is already registered.
Register.usernameTakenError: This username is already taken. Please choose another one.
Register.registrationGenericError: An unexpected error occurred during registration. Please try again.
Register.successCheckEmail: Account created! Please check your email inbox to verify your account before logging in.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.noGroupTitle: You haven't created a group profile yet.
Profile.noGroupDesc: Create one to go out and match with others!

CreateGroup.title: Create Group
CreateGroup.instagramInfo: Add Instagram usernames for yourself or your group members. These will appear as @links on your public profile.
CreateGroup.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell others about your group, vibe, or plans...
CreateGroup.termsText: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and the <guidelines>Community Guidelines</guidelines>.
CreateGroup.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
CreateGroup.minAge: Minimum age must be at least 18.
CreateGroup.maxAge: Maximum age must be greater than minimum age.

Messages.emptyDesc: Match with other groups in the carousel to start a conversation.
Messages.title: Messages
Messages.noLikesDesc: When other groups like your profile, they will appear here. You can then message them directly.
Messages.noBlockedGroupsDesc: Groups you block will appear here. You can unblock them anytime.

Chat.confirmBlockDesc: Are you sure? This will hide the chat and prevent further contact.
Chat.blockedChatError: This conversation is no longer available.

SearchGroups.endOfList: You've seen all the groups near Mainz.
SearchGroups.emptyDesc: Try increasing your search distance or check back later for new groups.
SearchGroups.groupRequiredDesc: To match, like, send messages, or unlock more groups near you, you must create a profile for your own group first.
SearchGroups.title: Discover

ForgotPassword.title: Reset Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: Welcome to gloo. By accessing or using our application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Community Guidelines.
Terms.section1Content: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. You are responsible for safeguarding your account password and for any activities or actions under your password.
Terms.section2Content: You agree not to use the app for any illegal or unauthorized purpose. Harassment, hate speech, or inappropriate behavior towards other crews is strictly prohibited.
Terms.section3Content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, without notice or liability, for any reason, including breach of these Terms.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At gloo, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
Privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email, date of birth, and location data when explicitly shared to match you with nearby groups.
Privacy.section2Content: Your data is used solely to provide and improve our services, match you with relevant groups, and ensure a safe environment for our community.
Privacy.section3Content: We do not sell your personal data. We only share information with third parties when necessary to provide our services or comply with legal obligations.

Map.title: Gloo Map
Map.noGroups: No groups yet. Be the first!
Map.privacyNote: Your marker is visible on the map. Exact address is hidden and only shared in chat.
Map.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. We bought 2 crates of beer! Join us!
Map.privacySafeDesc: We will mark the current center of your map, but your exact street/house number will be hidden until you chat with a match.

Preferences.title: Search Preferences
Preferences.howItWorksDesc: These filters control which groups you see in the discovery feed. Changes apply immediately after saving.

Verify.title: Verify your Account
Verify.subtitle: You are just one click away from joining the best pre-parties in your area.
Verify.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid or has already been used.
